name: brazilayer-mcp
description: Brazilian company registry (CNPJ) and official sanctions screening for AI agents, paid per call in USDC via the x402 protocol. No signup, no API keys.

private_key.title: Wallet private key (0x…)
private_key.description: Private key of the wallet that pays for calls (USDC on Base). Use a dedicated wallet with a small budget. Leave empty to use only the free sample tools.
